song_name: Rachel Platten - Fight Song - Katy Perry - Firework - Andra Day - Rise Up
tuning: E A D G B E
content:
rachel platten - fight song - katy perry - firework - andra day - rise up - Keala Settle - This Is Me


[Verse 1- Fight Song]
[tab]              [ch]G[/ch]
Like a Small boat on the ocean[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]G[/ch]
Sending big waves into motion[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]Em[/ch]                     [ch]C[/ch]
Like how a single word can make a heart open[/tab]
[tab]                        [ch]G[/ch]
I might only have one match[/tab]
[tab]                         [ch]G[/ch]
But i can make an explosion[/tab]


[Verse 2- Firework]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]             [ch]Am[/ch]
Do you ever feel already buried deep[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                          [ch]C[/ch]
Six feet under screams but no one seems to hear a thing[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                        [ch]Am[/ch]
Do you know that there’s still a chance for you[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                        [ch]C[/ch]
Cause there’s a spark in you[/tab]


[Chorus 1- Rise Up]
[tab]              [ch]G[/ch]
And I’ll rise up rise like the day[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]D[/ch]
I’ll rise up i’ll rise unafraid[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Em[/ch]                             [ch]C[/ch]
I’ll rise up and i’ll do it a thousand times again[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]G[/ch]
And I’ll rise up high like the waves[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]D[/ch]
I’ll rise up in spite of the ache[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Em[/ch]                             [ch]C[/ch]
I’ll rise up and i’ll do it a thousand times again[/tab]


[Prechorus 1- Firework]
[tab]                  [ch]G[/ch]        [ch]Am[/ch]        [ch]Em[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]
You just gotta ignite the light and let it shine[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]G[/ch]        [ch]Am[/ch]             [ch]Em[/ch]        [ch]C[/ch]
Just own the night like the fourth of july[/tab]


[Verse 3- This is Me]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                         [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]
Another round of bullets hits my skin[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]C[/ch]         [ch]Em[/ch]            [ch]D[/ch]
Well fire away (cuz today) I won’t let the shame sink in[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Em[/ch]                   [ch]D[/ch]
We are (bursting through the barricades)[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]G[/ch]
And reaching for the sun[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]C[/ch]    [ch]Em[/ch]               [ch]D[/ch]
(we are warriors) yea that’s what we’ve become[/tab]


[Prechorus 2- Fight Song]
[tab]                    [ch]G/B[/ch]            [ch]C[/ch]
And all of those things I didn’t say[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]D[/ch]               [ch]Em[/ch]
Wrecking balls inside my brain[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]G/B[/ch]             [ch]C[/ch]
I will sing them loud tonight[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]D[/ch]
Can you hear my voice this time[/tab]


[Chorus 2- Firework]
[tab]                [ch]G[/ch]      [ch]Am[/ch]
Baby you’re a firework[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]Em[/ch]            [ch]C[/ch]
Come on show them what you’re worth[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]G[/ch]      [ch]Am[/ch]
Make them go “oh oh oh”[/tab]
[tab]                        [ch]Em[/ch]        [ch]C[/ch]
As you shoot across the sky sky sky[/tab]


[Bridge- This is Me]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                                               [ch]Em[/ch]
(Oh-oh-oh-oh) And I know that I deserve your love[/tab]
[tab]                                         [ch]C[/ch]
(Oh-oh-oh-oh) There's nothing I'm not worthy of[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]D[/ch]
Oh-oh-oh, oh-oh-oh, oh-oh-oh, oh, oh[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]G[/ch]
When the sharpest words wanna cut me down[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]Em[/ch]
I'm gonna send a flood, gonna drown them out[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]C[/ch]
This is brave, this is bruised[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]D[/ch]                          N.C.
This is who I'm meant to be, this is me[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
Look out 'cause here I come (Look out 'cause here I come)[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Em[/ch]
And I'm marching on to the beat I drum (Marching on, marching, marching on)[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]C[/ch]                           [ch]D[/ch]
I'm not scared to be seen I make no apologies, this is me[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]    [ch]Em[/ch]     [ch]C[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]
Oh-oh-oh-oh x4[/tab]

[tab](When the sharpest words wanna break me down)
(I'm gonna send a flood, gonna drown them out)
I'm gonna send a flood, gonna drown them out
Oh-oh-oh, oh-oh-oh, oh-oh-oh, oh, oh[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]G[/ch]
This is me[/tab]
